hero.label: Made for Leaping AI
hero.headline: I want to help Leaping AI land its next 50 enterprise call center clients.
hero.subheadline: Voice AI that autonomously handles 70% of calls at Hawesko and converts 30% of leads in a week is a product that sells itself. But it still needs someone to get in the room. I want to be that person for Leaping AI as you scale from Europe into the US market.

whyCompany.title: 70% call automation is a metric that closes enterprise deals
whyCompany.body: When you tell a BPO or franchise operator 'we handled 70% of your calls with 90% customer satisfaction,' the meeting books itself. I know how to take a result like that and turn it into a repeatable outbound sequence that generates pipeline.

whyCompany.title: US expansion is the next growth lever and needs a dedicated SDR
whyCompany.body: You have proven case studies in Europe including Hawesko and the Jamaican BPO. Breaking into the US mid-market requires local outbound hustle. I'm based in Arizona, OPT-authorized from June 2026, and ready to own the top of your US funnel.

whyCompany.title: My BDR background plus AI tools experience is the exact fit
whyCompany.body: I spent over a year as a BDR at Copygen.ai doing cold outreach from zero to 15-20 paying B2B clients. On the side I've deployed OpenClaw AI agents including an automated BDR system. I understand what you're building and I can talk to prospects who are skeptical about AI replacing their agents.

quote: You've proven the product works in Europe. I want to help you prove it works in the US, starting with the first 10 enterprise contracts I help close.
